svg.title: Hamster mini-sleep-peek v1 (scripted)
svg.desc: Mini-mode sleep hover/peek state for clawd-on-desk / MiniCPM-Desk-Pet. It starts from the confirmed mini-sleep loop, keeps the sleeping head/body/breathing/Zzz motion, and holds the post-peek pose by default because the real window push/pull is handled by the app; add ?loop=1 for the self-contained showcase/demo rest-to-push-to-hold-to-pull cycle. Both paws stay clamped to the screen edge with the sleep-peek motion trail. svg root keeps pointer-events:none. Exposes window.__miniSleepPeek. Pure paths plus soft-lift filter, no image/gradient/fetch.
